plugin_desc: Waystream ASR / FTTH switch SNMP child template (IANA PEN 9303). The verified WAYSTREAM-SMI and WAYSTREAM-RPM-MIB private tree is focused on enterprise identity and RPM/IPTV QoS objects, and no row-filter-free scalar device-health gauges were confirmed in the available state. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Switch SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/switch metric model while this plugin provides the Waystream collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power-supply state are not collected (N/A). Supported brands/models — Waystream ASR and FTTH access switches.
name: Switch
